flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of California-Davis rose 38% between 2007 and 2010 ($8.0k → $11.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of California-Davis rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.4k → $51.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of California-Davis rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.6k → $16.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of California-Davis fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
